Test Case Description: Send: "check my inbox"
Expected Output: AI shows list of recent emails with sender, subject, and date

Test Case Description: Send: "show me emails from rushikesh"
Expected Output: AI searches and shows emails from Rushikesh only

Test Case Description: Send: "search for emails about meeting"
Expected Output: AI searches and shows emails with 'meeting' in subject or body

Test Case Description: First check inbox, then send: "reply to the first email that I'll attend"
Expected Output: AI replies to first email with message containing 'I'll attend'

Test Case Description: Send: "send an email to rushikesh@peppi.ai about the project update"
Expected Output: AI drafts and sends email to rushikesh@peppi.ai with subject and body

Test Case Description: Send: "mark the first email as read"
Expected Output: AI marks first email as read

Test Case Description: Send: "show my unread emails"
Expected Output: AI shows only unread emails

Test Case Description: Send: "search emails from last week"
Expected Output: AI shows emails from past 7 days

Test Case Description: Send: "forward the first email to test@peppi.ai"
Expected Output: AI forwards first email to test@peppi.ai

Test Case Description: Send: "send email to john@test.com with subject 'Test' and message 'Hello'"
Expected Output: AI sends email with exact subject and message

Test Case Description: User 1 sends: "check my inbox". User 2 sends: "check my inbox"
Expected Output: Each user sees only their own emails (not each other's)

Test Case Description: Send: "reply to tanmay's email that I confirm"
Expected Output: AI finds tanmay's email and replies with confirmation

Test Case Description: Send: "show me emails with attachments"
Expected Output: AI shows emails that have attachments

Test Case Description: Send: "what's my latest email"
Expected Output: AI shows the most recent email received

Test Case Description: Send: "send email to multiple people: john@test.com
Expected Output: jane@test.com"
Actual Output: AI sends same email to both recipients

Test Case Description: Send: "show my calendar for today"
Expected Output: AI lists all events scheduled for today with times

Test Case Description: Send: "create a meeting with rushikesh@peppi.ai tomorrow at 3pm for code review"
Expected Output: AI creates calendar event for tomorrow 3pm with rushikesh as attendee

Test Case Description: Create meeting at 4pm. Then send: "change the time to 6pm"
Expected Output: AI finds the meeting and updates time to 6pm (NOT creates new event)

Test Case Description: Create meeting for code review at 4pm. Then: "change my code review meeting to 5pm"
Expected Output: AI searches for 'code review' meeting and updates to 5pm

Test Case Description: Send: "schedule a meeting for Project Discussion on March 1st at 10am"
Expected Output: AI creates event on March 1st at 10am with title 'Project Discussion'

Test Case Description: Send: "what meetings do I have tomorrow"
Expected Output: AI shows all calendar events for tomorrow

Test Case Description: Create meeting at 2pm. Then: "cancel that meeting"
Expected Output: AI finds recent meeting and deletes it from calendar

Test Case Description: Send: "create an all-day event for Team Outing on Friday"
Expected Output: AI creates all-day event (no specific time) for Friday

Test Case Description: Send: "schedule meeting with john@test.com and jane@test.com at 4pm"
Expected Output: AI creates meeting with both attendees invited

Test Case Description: Create 2 meetings (4pm and 5pm). Then: "change my meeting to 6pm"
Expected Output: AI shows both meetings and asks which one to update (disambiguation)

Test Case Description: Send: "create meeting today at 3pm for 1 hour"
Expected Output: AI creates 1-hour meeting from 3pm to 4pm

Test Case Description: User 1 creates meeting. User 2 sends: "show my calendar"
Expected Output: User 2 should NOT see User 1's meeting (unless invited)

Test Case Description: Send: "update my 4pm meeting to 5pm" (timezone IST)
Expected Output: Time updates to 5pm IST (shown as 5pm, not UTC)

Test Case Description: Create meeting. Then: "add jane@test.com to the meeting"
Expected Output: AI updates meeting to include jane@test.com as attendee

Test Case Description: Send: "find my meeting about standup"
Expected Output: AI searches calendar for event with 'standup' in title

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me tomorrow at 2pm to buy milk"
Expected Output: AI creates reminder and confirms: ✅ Reminder set for tomorrow at 2:00 PM

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me in 30 minutes to check server"
Expected Output: AI creates reminder for 30 minutes from now and confirms time

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me every day at 9am to take medicine"
Expected Output: AI creates daily recurring reminder at 9am

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me every Monday at 10am for standup"
Expected Output: AI creates weekly Monday reminder at 10am

Test Case Description: Send: "show my reminders"
Expected Output: AI lists all active reminders with times in readable format

Test Case Description: Create: "remind me at 2pm to buy milk". Then: "change my milk reminder to 3pm"
Expected Output: AI finds milk reminder and UPDATES time to 3pm (NOT cancel + recreate)

Test Case Description: Create: "remind me daily at 8am to exercise". Then: "change my exercise reminder to 7am"
Expected Output: AI finds exercise reminder and updates time to 7am

Test Case Description: Create: "remind me at 2pm to call John". Then: "cancel my call reminder"
Expected Output: AI finds call reminder and cancels it

Test Case Description: Create 3 reminders. Then: "update my reminder"
Expected Output: AI shows all 3 and asks which one to update (disambiguation)

Test Case Description: Send: "cancel my grocery reminder" (when no grocery reminder exists)
Expected Output: AI says: ❌ No matching reminder found. Shows your active reminders.

Test Case Description: User 1 creates reminder. User 2 sends: "show my reminders"
Expected Output: User 2 should NOT see User 1's reminder (data isolation)

Test Case Description: User 1: "remind me to buy milk". User 2: "cancel my milk reminder"
Expected Output: User 2 cannot cancel User 1's reminder (security)

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me tomorrow at 10am to test" (timezone IST)
Expected Output: Reminder shows 10:00 AM in confirmation (not UTC time)

Test Case Description: Create: "remind me at 10am to test". Update to 2pm.
Expected Output: Time updates to 2:00 PM IST (shown in local time, stored as UTC)

Test Case Description: Send: "don't let me forget to call mom at 5pm"
Expected Output: AI creates reminder (understands different phrasing)

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me at noon tomorrow to have lunch"
Expected Output: AI creates reminder for 12:00 PM (understands 'noon')

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me yesterday at 5pm" (past time)
Expected Output: AI rejects: ⚠️ That time has already passed

Test Case Description: Send: "remind me tomorrow to buy groceries" (no time)
Expected Output: AI asks: What time should I remind you?

Test Case Description: Create: "remind me in 2 minutes to test". Wait 2 minutes.
Expected Output: Reminder fires at correct time. User gets SMS + see in chat with ⏰ icon

Test Case Description: Create daily reminder. Verify it fires on Day 1 and Day 2.
Expected Output: Reminder fires on both days (recurring works correctly)
